```lean
lemma image_empty {U : Type} {A : Set U}
    (f : U → ℕ) (h : empty A) : image f A = I 0 := by
  have h₁ : A = ∅ := by
    apply Set.eq_empty_of_forall_not_mem
    intro x hx
    have h₂ : x ∈ A := hx
    have h₃ : empty A := h
    exact h₃.not_mem x h₂
  rw [h₁]
  simp [image_empty]
  <;> simp_all [Set.Ici]
  <;> aesop

theorem Theorem_8_1_5_3_type {U : Type} :
    ctble U ↔ ∃ (f : U → Nat), one_to_one f := by
  have h₁ : ctble U ↔ ∃ (f : U → Nat), one_to_one f := by
    -- Use the fact that a set is countable if and only if there exists an injective function from the set to ℕ
    have h₂ : ctble U ↔ ∃ (f : U → ℕ), Function.Injective f := by
      simp [ctble, Nat.cast_inj]
      <;>
      aesop
    -- Simplify the right-hand side to match the required form
    have h₃ : (∃ (f : U → ℕ), Function.Injective f) ↔ (∃ (f : U → Nat), one_to_one f) := by
      constructor
      · -- Forward direction: Function.Injective implies one_to_one
        intro h
        obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h
        refine' ⟨f, _⟩
        intro x y hxy
        apply hf
        exact hxy
      · -- Backward direction: one_to_one implies Function.Injective
        intro h
        obtain ⟨f, hf⟩ := h
        refine' ⟨f, _⟩
        intro x y hxy
        apply hf
        exact hxy
    -- Combine the two equivalences to get the final result
    simp_all
  exact h₁
```lean
```lean
theorem Exercise_8_1_17 {U : Type} {A B : Set U}
    (h1 : B ⊆ A) (h2 : ctble A) : ctble B := by
  -- Use the fact that if B is a subset of A and A is countable, then B is countable.
  have h3 : ctble B := by
    -- Use the property of countable sets that subsets of countable sets are countable.
    have h4 : B ⊆ A := h1
    have h5 : ctble A := h2
    -- Use the fact that if a set is countable, then any subset of it is also countable.
    exact ctble_of_subset h4 h5
  -- The result follows from the above steps.
  exact h3

```lean
  <;> aes

by
  have h₁ : image f A = ∅ := by
    have h₂ : A = ∅ := by
      simpa [empty] using h
    rw [h₂]
    simp [Set.image_empty]
  have h₂ : (I 0 : Set ℕ) = ∅ := by
    simp [Set.Iio_eq_empty]
  rw [h₁, h₂]
  <;> simp

by
  ext x
  simp only [Set.mem_image, Set.mem_singleton_iff, if_false, eq_self_iff_true]
  <;>
  (try simp_all [setEmpty_iff]) <;>
  (try aesop) <;>
  (try omega)
  <;>
  (try
    {
      by_contra h₁
      have h₂ : ∃ (u : U), u ∈ A := by
        by_contra h₂
        simp_all [setEmpty_iff]
        <;> aesop
      obtain ⟨u, hu⟩ := h₂
      simp_all [setEmpty_iff]
      <;> aesop
    }
  )
  <;>
  (try
    {
      by_contra h₁
      simp_all [setEmpty_iff]
      <;> aesop
    }
  )
  <;>
  (try
    {
      simp_all [setEmpty_iff]
      <;> aesop
    }
  )
  <;>
  (try
    {
      aesop
    }
  )
